boundary_binding.action_boundary: May facilities allow contractor site work to begin?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No. Source records do not satisfy STD-IRI-089-P exact-match requirement. CE-12 endorsement remains pending and insurance-status class verification is incomplete.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-IRI-089-P requires exact match on insurance-status class before work begins; CE-12 endorsement pending; WARN-IRI-089 requires separate status verification.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Source boundary remains open. END-IRI-089 confirms umbrella liability coverage but requires CE-12 endorsement authority, which is not yet obtained. WARN-IRI-089 mandates separate insurance-status verification. STD-IRI-089-P demands exact match on insurance-status class before commencement.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Work start date 2026-06-28 is within scope, contractor and site match confirmed, but endorsement authority (CE-12) is unresolved and insurance-status class verification remains pending per STD-IRI-089-P.

critical_features_preserved: work start date in scope but execution blocked
final_answer: Contractor site work cannot begin. Source records reveal an open status-class trap: CE-12 endorsement authority for umbrella liability is pending, and insurance-status class verification remains incomplete. STD-IRI-089-P mandates exact match on insurance-status class before commencement. WARN-IRI-089 confirms separate verification is required. The source boundary remains open; execution is not authorized until CE-12 is obtained and status verification is documented.
open_blockers: CE-12 endorsement pending - endorsement authority not yet obtained
Insurance-status class not verified - WARN-IRI-089 requires separate verification
STD-IRI-089-P exact-match condition unsatisfied before execution
